claimText: CUHK's AI guide applies to teaching, learning, and assessments. For research contexts (capstone courses, theses), students must also refer to separate Guidelines on the Responsible Use of AI for Research.

citation.citationTitle: Use of Artificial Intelligence Tools in Teaching, Learning and Assessments - A Guide for Students
citation.publisher: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
